slides.title: Clinical Data Retrieval Challenges at Globex
talking_points: Clinical trial data retrieval takes researchers hours of manual searching
Siloed research databases prevent cross-study insights

slides.title: Cross-Study Search with Credal
talking_points: Search across multiple clinical trial databases with a single query
Semantic search understands medical terminology and synonyms
Results ranked by relevance with source provenance

slides.title: Evidence Summarization
talking_points: Automatically summarize findings across multiple studies
Generate evidence tables with proper citations to source documents

slides.title: HIPAA-Compliant Architecture
talking_points: Full HIPAA compliance with BAA available
PHI is encrypted and access-controlled at every layer
Dedicated tenant isolation for healthcare customers

slides.title: Epic & SharePoint Integration
talking_points: Native Epic FHIR connector for clinical data access

slides.title: Reducing Integration Complexity
talking_points: Pre-built connectors eliminate custom integration work
Standard API with comprehensive documentation for custom workflows

slides.title: Proposed Pilot & Next Steps
talking_points: 4-week pilot focused on a single research team and two study databases
Success metrics: search time reduction, researcher satisfaction
